summary: Tier 1 Vale sibling folded into I71 P2 from the I71 P1 strategic review (operator-asked: 'do I have to put a never-ending list of words here?' surfacing the regex-cardinality concern). Single Vocab pair per C-71-Vale-2 default (simpler; fewer files; deterministic generation; lower operator maintenance cost). Generator supports --check (CI drift detection) + --dry-run modes. release-gate.py row 'BRAND voice Vale sibling (deterministic-NLP layer; ...)' wired adjacent to the existing voice-register row (per D-IH-71-J in-place extension policy); host-conditional SKIP when vale binary absent. 21-case test suite at tests/test_vale_styles_generator.py (deterministic output + Vale-YAML validity + Vocab correctness + --check semantics + graceful skip on absent canonical; PASS). Vale runs ALONGSIDE the regex chassis (not replacing it): regex catches named violations cheaply; Vale catches grammar patterns regex cannot express (e.g., any superlative-adjective in a customer-facing slide H1).

title: I-NN-CROSS-AREA-OPS-WIRING-REVIEW candidate amendment: every-area scope with review-density tiers (supersedes original backbone-only scope; operator s4 second-novel framing 2026-05-23)
summary: Operator-explicit s4 ratification (Wave R Bundle C amendment 2026-05-23 UTC+2) extending the I-NN-CROSS-AREA-OPS-WIRING-REVIEW candidate with the operator-novel framing: every area's Ops surface deserves explicit cross-area wiring at its own hierarchy + ownership level; no small-vs-big prioritization; small or big is just backfilling data. Original D-IH-81-O candidate scoped the discipline to four backbone areas (FINOPS / PeopleOps / RevOps / LegalOps). The s4 framing rejects the backbone-vs-non-backbone hierarchy as implicit small-vs-big prioritization. Amended scope: every area registered in baseline_organisation.csv participates with review-density tiered by current wiring density -- Tier 1 (Dense wiring spines; weekly-monthly cadence; original backbone four), Tier 2 (Active but quieter; quarterly; Marketing + Operations + Research/Methodology), Tier 3 (Reference-frame; semi-annual or on-trigger; Brand + Ethics + Compliance + Legal-as-canon-set). Tier assignment is descriptive of current wiring density not prescriptive of area importance; areas can promote + demote tier as wiring matures or quiets. A2 activation gate amended to require TWO areas exercised end-to-end (any areas; FINOPS recommended but not mandated) to protect against single-area generalisation failure mode. §5 anti-patterns REPLACED "Forcing all areas into the discipline" with "Treating non-Tier-1 areas as out-of-scope" -- the right protection against governance theatre on quiet areas is tier-assignment + cadence-floor not exclusion. External research grounding added per akos-applied-research-discipline.mdc RULE 2 (novel framing): Team Topologies' three interaction modes (Collaboration / X-as-a-Service / Facilitating) framework + DDD context mapping's every-bounded-context-relationship-explicit pattern -- both converge on every-X-pair-gets-explicit-relationship-contract principle the operator articulated at the area level. Candidate stays at status: candidate per q3-b (no promotion to full initiative); activation criteria amended; Quality Fabric 12th specialty mint deferred until A2 two-area floor cleared.
notes: Reversibility low: candidate-amendment-only; no canonical files modified; no validator changes; supersedes nothing canonical; if discipline later proves over-scoped at promotion, the §3.1 tier table can be re-narrowed via successor decision. External research citations are stable URLs from authoritative sources (Team Topologies official + Codelit DDD synthesis + Martin Fowler bliki + Software Architecture Guild).

Bundle B-2b scope (24 file delta): (1) Supabase migration supabase/migrations/20260524100000_i81_p2_b2b_pgmq_rpc_wrappers.sql exposes 5 pgmq operations as SECURITY DEFINER RPC wrappers in public schema (pgmq_send_finops_writer + pgmq_read_finops_writer + pgmq_delete_finops_writer + pgmq_archive_finops_writer + pgmq_read_finops_dlq) granting EXECUTE to service_role -- works around PostgREST limitation that schema-qualified pgmq.send functions cannot be called directly via supabase-js client RPC. (2) Six shared TypeScript modules at supabase/functions/_shared/finops/: types.ts (mirrors Pydantic enum frozensets as ReadonlySet + RegisteredFactRow / CounterpartyResolutionResult / FxSnapshot / OpsRegisterEmitPayload interfaces); counterparty_resolver.ts (R1-a engagement-model-aware router with 4-strategy ladder + manual_review fallback emitting OPS row); fx_snapshot.ts (R2-a ECB-authoritative cache reader + 0.5%% Stripe divergence detector + computeFxSnapshotFromDb / computeFxSnapshotFromLookup); ops_register_emit.ts (R4-a 24-col OPS_REGISTER row builder + RICE auto-score + ops_register_mirror insert); stripe_event_logger.ts (R3-a Layer 1 idempotency: logStripeEvent + enqueueFinopsEvent + markStripeEventProcessed + incrementStripeEventAttempts). (3) Two NEW Edge Functions: supabase/functions/fx-rate-cache-refresh/index.ts (Supabase scheduled function; fetches ECB SDMX daily reference rates for USD/GBP/CHF; performs X/EUR currency inversion; upserts to holistika_ops.fx_rate_cache) AND supabase/functions/finops-writer-worker/index.ts (consumes pgmq.finops_writer_queue via RPC wrappers; reads raw event from holistika_ops.stripe_events; applies counterparty_resolver + fx_snapshot; constructs finops.registered_fact row with idempotency layer 3 ON CONFLICT skip; deletes queue message on success; retries with exponential backoff + archives to finops_writer_dlq + emits OPS row after 4 failures; checkDlqDepth alert). (4) One MODIFIED Edge Function: supabase/functions/stripe-webhook-handler/index.ts refactored from 270-line monolith into thin orchestrator (signature verification + dispatch fanout) with extracted dispatch modules at supabase/functions/stripe-webhook-handler/dispatch/: finops_dispatch.ts (mandatory; logs raw event to holistika_ops.stripe_events + enqueues to pgmq.finops_writer_queue for FINOPS-scope event types; never throws; returns FinopsDispatchOutcome) + kirbe_holistika_dispatch.ts (best-effort; preserves original kirbe + holistika_ops billing-plane routing verbatim; failures isolated from FINOPS path). (5) Five inline Deno test files (per b2b-test-b ratification): test_types.ts + test_counterparty_resolver.ts + test_fx_snapshot.ts + test_ops_register_emit.ts + test_stripe_event_logger.ts cover the 6 shared modules + 2 dispatch tests (test_finops_dispatch.ts + test_kirbe_holistika_dispatch.ts) cover the orchestrator dispatch branches. (6) Two Python runbooks: scripts/finops_dlq_drain.py (operator tool for inspecting + requeuing + acknowledging DLQ entries via pgmq RPC wrappers; DlqEntry/DrainOperation/DrainSummary Pydantic models; CLI surface --self-test/--inspect/--requeue/--acknowledge--reason; akos-executable-process-catalog.mdc Rule 1 AC-HUMAN+AC-AUTOMATION) + scripts/stripe_audit_metadata.py (operator pre-flight audit identifying orphan customers + hlk_billing_plane-missing subscriptions + holistika_ops-without-stripe_customer_link rows before B-2c go-live; StripeMetadataFinding/StripeAuditReport Pydantic models; classify_customer/classify_subscription predicates; CLI --self-test/--audit-customers/--audit-subscriptions/--output-json/--output-csv). (7) Paired pytest: tests/test_finops_dlq_drain.py (28 tests; Pydantic models + RPC name registry + env-shortcircuit + CLI smoke) + tests/test_stripe_audit_metadata.py (18 tests; Pydantic models + classify_* predicates + JSON/CSV output round-trip + CLI smoke) = 46 new tests; existing 57 B-2a tests preserved -> 103 FINOPS tests total. (8) Release-gate INFO advisory wiring: config/verification-profiles.json gains finops_dlq_drain_self_test + stripe_audit_metadata_self_test steps in pre_commit profile; scripts/release-gate.py adds run_finops_dlq_drain_self_test + run_stripe_audit_metadata_self_test functions wired into main() results table as INFO rows. Mechanical evidence (this commit): py scripts/finops_dlq_drain.py --self-test PASS; py scripts/stripe_audit_metadata.py --self-test PASS; py -m pytest tests/test_finops_dlq_drain.py tests/test_stripe_audit_metadata.py -q 46/46 PASS; py -m pytest tests/test_validate_finops_ledger.py tests/test_hlk_fx_rate.py tests/test_resolve_counterparty_id.py -q 57/57 PASS (B-2a regression baseline preserved); py scripts/validate_hlk.py umbrella OVERALL PASS; py scripts/validate_decision_register.py PASS (410 active + 2 superseded after D-IH-81-W lands); py -c ast.parse on release-gate.py + json.load on verification-profiles.json syntax OK. Production deployment workflow (out-of-band; not part of this commit): npx supabase db push (applies pgmq RPC wrappers migration) + npx supabase functions deploy fx-rate-cache-refresh + npx supabase functions deploy finops-writer-worker + npx supabase functions deploy stripe-webhook-handler + cron schedule fx-rate-cache-refresh daily 06:00 UTC + cron schedule finops-writer-worker every 1m. Proof-of-life criterion (deferred to D-IH-81-X = B-2c closure): first live Stripe charge_succeeded event in AT environment writes successfully to finops.registered_fact with resolved counterparty_id + computed amount_minor_eur via ECB cache hit -- validates the full R1-a + R2-a + R3-a + R4-a pipeline end-to-end. INFO->FAIL strict-mode promotion on validate_finops_ledger + finops_dlq_drain + stripe_audit_metadata gated at that proof-of-life event.
notes: Reversibility medium: executable layer (Edge Functions + dispatch modules + runbooks + pgmq RPC wrappers migration + release-gate INFO advisory wiring) can be rolled back via supabase functions delete + supabase migration rollback (DROP FUNCTION pgmq_* wrappers) + git revert of TypeScript/Python files. Dispatch pattern refactor (b2b-wh-b) is moderate-blast-radius: kirbe/holistika_ops billing-plane logic preserved verbatim in dispatch/kirbe_holistika_dispatch.ts with smoke-test coverage; refactor risk mitigated by best-effort wrapper around dispatchKirbeHolistika in orchestrator (FINOPS path never blocked by Kirbe/Holistika failure; Stripe always receives 200 OK as long as FINOPS dispatch succeeds). Idempotency invariants survive rollback: holistika_ops.stripe_events PK=stripe_event_id + finops.registered_fact ON CONFLICT skip via composite unique constraint ensures no double-writes on retry storms. pgmq RPC wrappers are forward-only DDL (no existing data; only function definitions in public schema); DROP FUNCTION rollback safe. ECB SDMX endpoint is external dependency; fx-rate-cache-refresh tolerates fetch failures gracefully (4-tier fallback ladder per R2-a). Strict-mode promotion gated at D-IH-81-X (B-2c closure + first live Stripe round-trip evidence) preserves operator ability to amend dispatch/orchestrator at any execution gate without backed-out commits.

title: 5-option disposition enum ratification for SYNTHESIS_BEFORE_TRANCHE findings (scope-complete / scope-extend / scope-narrow / defer-OPS / escalate-to-blocker-tracker) + per-tranche-class firing rules
summary: Operator auto-default per Time-box recovery 2026-05-25 (Q-D meta-discussion proxy ratify): ratifies the 5-option disposition enum codified in akos.hlk_synthesis_before_tranche.VALID_DISPOSITIONS frozenset for findings emitted by the synthesis sweep. Per-finding dispositions: (1) scope-complete — finding represents real gap but planned scope already covers it; no tranche-charter amendment needed; (2) scope-extend — finding represents real gap NOT covered by planned scope; amend tranche-charter to extend scope in current commit; (3) scope-narrow — finding indicates planned scope OVER-extends; amend tranche-charter to narrow scope; (4) defer-OPS — finding represents real gap but defer-to-OPS_REGISTER row for next-wave consolidation; preserves operator visibility without blocking current commit; (5) escalate-to-blocker-tracker — finding cannot be dispositioned in-chat; mint docs/wip/planning/_blockers/<slug>-tracker.md per akos-conflict-surfacing-and-blocker-trackers.mdc. Per akos-inline-ratification.mdc + paired inline-ratify-craft skill: dispositions surface via batched AskQuestion gate when findings > 1; time-box recovery applies to reversible dispositions only (scope-narrow / defer-OPS / scope-complete); irreversible dispositions (scope-extend committing operator content; escalate-to-blocker-tracker committing forward-pointer file) NEVER auto-default. Per-tranche-class firing per DIMENSION_FIRE_RULES (codified in D-IH-86-EB): the SAME 5-option enum applies to all tranche classes; the fire-set determines WHICH dimensions surface findings, not which disposition options are available. When true: collaborator issues parallel invoice to customer for their share (e.g., SUEZ POC: EFA Académie / Aïsha invoice SUEZ directly for the 15% bd_commission_overlay portion); when false: collaborator's share is netted within Holistika's customer-facing invoice and Holistika subsequently issues partner invoice (the default Websitz/Rushly deep_partner_65_35 shape). Surfaces accounting + treasury + customer-PO-routing implications at SHARE_REGISTRY row authoring time; CS-09 informational warning fires when a bd_commission_overlay row is authored with parallel_invoice_stream_indicator=false (the BD commission pattern almost always invoices in parallel; in-kind BD commission is anomalous and operator should confirm). Mirrors Supabase ADD COLUMN parallel_invoice_stream_indicator BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE; backward-compat: pre-rewrite rows default to false via the Commit-5 migration SQL (matches lived in-kind reality of Websitz/Rushly precedent).
notes: Reversibility medium: boolean column is reversible via Supabase DROP COLUMN + Pydantic tuple shrink + ~10 unit test deletions. Demotion would re-lose the accounting/treasury operational distinction the SUEZ post-handshake meeting surfaced; future engagements with parallel-invoice BD partners would have to encode the distinction in notes prose (un-queryable). Forward path: per-row column promotes to mandatory field (no default) when active engagement count > 5 AND > 2 distinct values exercised (current: 5 engagements all default false; the SUEZ recommercialisation per D-IH-86-EL is the first row authored with parallel_invoice_stream_indicator=true).

De-forks PARENT_OF/PROGRAM_PARENT_OF/TOPIC_PARENT_OF into one composition verb (ArchiMate 4.0 precedent). Layers = composition + ragged-hierarchy patterns (APQC/Kimball/MDM). Stay LPG (Neo4j) + impose typed schema. Doctrine home = new Knowledge Manager role under People (KM currently diffused across CPO/Learning Curator/AI Engineer). Area-completeness v3 = articulation completeness (every canonical wired with valid triples), subsuming the 16-component model. Build Option D staged B->C->E, articulation-first.
